title: lippia lindmanii
intro: Lippia lindmanii, also known as Lindman's lippia, is a species of flowering plant in the verbena family, native to tropical Africa. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Lippia lindmanii include its potential to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, and is also used in traditional medicine in various forms, including tinctures and essential oils.
